title: achillea distans subsp. tanacetifolia
intro: Achillea distans subsp. tanacetifolia, also known as Tansy-leaved Yarrow, is a perennial plant species in the Asteraceae family, native to Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Achillea distans subsp. tanacetifolia include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and relieving menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, are made from the plant's leaves and flowers, and are used to treat various health conditions.
